author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (App init contract change ripples to main.rs::cmd_tui callers).

**Fix outline:** Eliminate the two-phase init in src/tui/app.rs. Introduce AppBuilder { model, provider, endpoint, headers, system_prompt, hook_engine, memory_db, rules_content, ... } with builder methods and a finalize fn build(self) -> App. Delete App::new() in favor of App::from_builder or accept ApiConfig + Hooks + Rules + Memory as constructor parameters so missing wiring becomes a compile error rather than an obscure runtime failure (empty endpoint to reqwest at line 1355).

**Recommendation:** Touches the public-ish constructor pattern of the TUI App and the main.rs::cmd_tui call site. Owner-level decision on builder vs constructor-with-required-params, and on whether ApiConfig should be the unified wire-up object. Defer.
